explore.description: Read-only research agent. Can read files and search the web but cannot write, execute, or modify anything.

plan.description: Planning agent. Can read, search, and consult the advisory council but cannot execute code or modify files.

verify.description: Verification agent. Can run test commands and read files but cannot modify source code or delete anything.

guide.description: Conversational guide agent. Responds in natural language only; no tools are available.

worker.description: Full-access agent operating within the approved tool envelope defined by the manifest.

general.description: General-purpose agent with full tool access. Default when no agent type is specified.
